ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the model belongs to */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the model's purpose or features */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* The source of the data used for training the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON-formatted string containing the hyperparameters used during model training */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last time the model was updated or retrained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Name of the team lead */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the project's goals and scope */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* The budget allocated for the project */,
  "status_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the project status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being evaluated */,
  "round" INTEGER /* The round number of the evaluation */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area Under Curve metric */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall of the model */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the model */,
  "f1" REAL /* F1 Score of the model */,
  "threshold_power" INTEGER /* Power threshold used in evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* The version of the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "evaluation_environment" TEXT /* The environment (e.g., development, production) where the evaluation was performed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes about the evaluation */,
  "validation_split" REAL /* The percentage of data used for validation */,
  "test_split" REAL /* The percentage of data used for testing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., AUC, Accuracy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* The unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., %, absolute) */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Whether higher or lower values are better (e.g., 'higher', 'lower') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role within the organization (e.g., data scientist, ML engineer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* The date the user joined the company */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current employment status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_projects" (
  "user_project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-project mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* The specific role of the user in the project (e.g., lead, member) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date the user started working on the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date the user ended their involvement in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* A changelog describing the changes made in this version */,
  "performance_summary" TEXT /* A summary of the performance of this model version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "model_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-metric mapping */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* The value of the metric for the specific model version */,
  "threshold" REAL /* The threshold used for the metric evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation being logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the evaluation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the evaluation was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., success, failed) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* A detailed message or note about the log entry */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the evaluation was performed */,
  "environment" TEXT /* The environment in which the evaluation was performed (e.g., local, cloud) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_logs_evaluation_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluation_id") REFERENCES evaluations ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
